title: Toby Kuehl
compiled_truth: Toby Kuehl is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-10 to 2002-03-25), Toby Kuehl sent 49 and received 218 emails, totalling 267 interactions.
